name: Francis Nault
title: Nitro Commodities · Market Intelligence · Offtake
platform: Nitro — LCS Commodity Trading & Intelligence Platform
note: Runs parallel with VEGA and JURA. VEGA = AI comparables. Francis = live Nitro platform intelligence and direct market access validation.
mandate: Validate commodity market access, live pricing via Nitro, offtake agreement terms, and real-world buyer appetite for the project product specification.
responsibilities: Nitro Price Feed — pull live commodity pricing. Compare against model price deck assumption.
Offtake Assessment — signed offtake? With whom? Price terms, minimum volumes?
Buyer Appetite Validation — genuine buyer interest for product spec at project scale and location?
Market Access Risk — logistics chain to offtake delivery point costed and operational?
Product Specification Compliance — forecast product meets buyer minimum spec?
Commodity Cycle Positioning — where in cycle? Project coming to market at peak or trough?
Competing Supply Assessment — new supply coming in same commodity and timeframe?
Offtake Counterparty Credit Risk — buyer creditworthy? History of default?
Pricing Mechanism Review — formula consistent with how commodity actually trades?
Nitro Advisory Input — any LCS client intelligence relevant from active Nitro desk?
